channel.title: Defi on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Defi on Archive 03

item.title: Solana ($SOL): Is the 'Ethereum Killer' Ready for the Throne? 2026 Outlook
item.description: Solana ($SOL) is gaining traction as a true competitor to Ethereum thanks to low fees, high speeds, and surging DEX and stablecoin activity. We examine whether it’s a legitimate rival or just a high-beta altcoin.

item.title: The 'DeFi Bank' $AAVE: What Kind of Coin Is It? Price Forecast and Analysis
item.description: A deep-dive analysis into the potential and risks of Aave ($AAVE), a leading DeFi lending protocol. Three characters engage in a sharp debate on its growth potential through its native stablecoin $GHO, and key issues like smart contract risks, liquidation, and regulatory challenges.
